description_long: This is a vintage coupe car with an open-top design, featuring a long hood and exposed engine components on the front right side. The body is primarily painted in a muted gray with maroon fenders and wheels, and the rear section is covered with a tan soft-top material. The car has spoked wheels, a classic round headlamp on each side, and a single side mirror mounted on the driver's side. The interior appears to have a simple dashboard and a large steering wheel, with seating for two. The overall condition suggests age and wear, with visible weathering and patina on the surfaces.
description: A vintage open-top coupe car with a gray and maroon body, exposed engine, and spoked wheels, showing signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cockpit, exposed engine, and the full length of the car with its maroon wheels and tan rear cover.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round headlights, exposed engine, and the car's narrow profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the open cockpit, rear fender, and the worn soft-top cover.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tan soft-top, spare wheel, and the simple dashboard with a large steering wheel.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
